item.text: I’m updating the implementation CLI tests in `processes/impl-cli/tests` and then I’ll run the repo’s verification flow from the root. First I’m locating the existing gate discovery and provider redaction tests so I can make the additions in the right place without touching generated outputs.

I found both test files, including the existing redaction case in `provider-adapter.test.ts`. Next I’m reading those tests and the gate-discovery implementation so the new assertions match the actual precedence and failure-note behavior.

I’ve confirmed the gate resolver already prefers CI after scripts and docs, and I found the current redaction test weakness: it puts the secret on `--version` stderr, while the notes come from `auth status` failures. I’m reading the provider check implementation now so I can tighten the test against the exact failure path rather than just making the secret disappear incidentally.

I have the exact seam now. I’m making two focused test changes: one new CI-only gate discovery case, and one redaction test that moves the secret into the `auth status` failure stderr so we verify the notes are sanitized on the real failure path.
The test edits are in place. I’m running the affected tests first to catch any mismatch quickly, then I’ll refresh the test baseline if needed and run `bun run green-verify` from the repo root.

item.text:
Changed [processes/impl-cli/tests/gate-discovery.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/gate-discovery.test.ts) and [processes/impl-cli/tests/provider-adapter.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/provider-adapter.test.ts). I did not commit.

Tests added/tightened:
- Added a CI-only gate discovery test proving `resolveVerificationGates()` returns the workflow commands with `storyGateSource` and `epicGateSource` set to `"CI configuration"` when no explicit flags, package scripts, or policy docs exist.
- Tightened the provider redaction test so the secret is emitted on the failing `auth status` stderr path, then asserted the returned failure notes contain `Bearer [REDACTED]` and do not contain the raw token.

Gate result:
- Ran `bun run capture:test-baseline --force`
- Ran `bun run green-verify`
- Result: passed, including `117 pass`, `0 fail`, and the immutability guard reporting `No test file changes detected since the captured baseline.`
